allow: Bash(node -e "const q = require\(''./questions.json''\); const counts = {}; q.forEach\(x => { counts[x.difficulty] = \(counts[x.difficulty]||0\)+1; }\); console.log\(''total:'', q.length\); console.log\(''by difficulty:'', counts\);")

Bash(python -c "import json; q=json.load\(open\(''questions.json'',encoding=''utf-8''\)\); counts={}; [counts.update\({x[''difficulty'']: counts.get\(x[''difficulty''],0\)+1}\) for x in q]; print\(''total:'', len\(q\)\); print\(''by difficulty:'', counts\)")
